report_name: "Road Trap" Smishing Campaign Targets Switzerland with Fake Toll Notices

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: The "Road Trap" campaign uses SMS phishing (smishing) to deliver malicious links to mobile users in Switzerland, aiming to steal financial information.

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing Link
attack_patterns.description: The campaign sends deceptive SMS messages containing malicious links that lead to fraudulent websites impersonating Swiss transportation authorities.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing for Information
attack_patterns.description: The campaign's phishing websites are designed to harvest payment card details (credit card number, expiry date, CVV) and potentially online banking credentials from victims.

attack_patterns.name: Develop Capabilities
attack_patterns.description: Attackers in the "Road Trap" campaign are believed to use AI to generate more realistic, personalized, and grammatically correct scam messages to increase their effectiveness and evade detection.

campaigns.name: Road Trap
campaigns.description: A large-scale and sophisticated SMS phishing (smishing) campaign actively targeting mobile users in Switzerland with fake road toll and traffic fine notices to steal financial information.
campaigns.objective: Steal banking details and credit card information from mobile users.

identities.name: Swiss transportation authorities
identities.description: Swiss transportation and government agencies are impersonated by the 'Road Trap' campaign's phishing websites and SMS messages.

identities.name: Mobile users in Switzerland
identities.description: The primary target group of the 'Road Trap' smishing campaign.

infrastructure.name: Road Trap Phishing Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: High-quality, mobile-optimized phishing websites with valid HTTPS certificates used to impersonate Swiss authorities and steal financial credentials.

indicators.name: Suspicious Swiss Toll-Related Domain Query
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Swiss Toll-Related Domain Query
id: 7e8b1c2a-3d4e-4f5a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries for domains containing keywords related to Swiss tolls and fines, which may indicate 'Road Trap' smishing activity.
references:
  - https://darknetsearch.io/smishing-scam-switzerland-road-trap/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-10
tags:
  - attack.t1566
  - attack.initial_access
logsource:
  category: dns
detection:
  selection_keywords:
    QueryName|contains:
      - 'toll'
      - 'fine'
      - 'maut'
      - 'amende'
  selection_geo:
    QueryName|contains:
      - 'switzerland'
      - '-ch'
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate websites related to travel and tolls in Switzerland.
level: medium
indicators.description: Detects DNS queries to newly registered or suspicious domains containing keywords related to Swiss tolls and fines, as seen in the 'Road Trap' campaign.
